case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. ADELINA C LUNA

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-12-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, ADELINA C SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-2010
